title: antennaria alpina var. megacephala
intro: Antennaria alpina var. megacephala, also known as mountain everlasting, is a variety of flowering plant in the sunflower family (Asteraceae). It is native to mountainous regions in North America and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The plant is rich in flavonoids and terpenoids, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and supporting immune function. Antennaria alpina var. megacephala can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in herbal medicine to promote healing and well-being.
